updates.tweet_text:
Yesterday we finally got volatility & that means Failed Breakdowns in #ES_F. Newsletter was sent early with setups: The Failed Breakdown of Fridays 7482 low. We swept it 3:45PM, recovered, longed. +95

Plan: Ride runner. 7535=support. 7558, 7570, 7590 next. 7509/02  below 35 https://t.co/rxWI6XQp7j
